Uses of Class
com.irurueta.geometry.ColinearPointsException

  • Packages that use ColinearPointsException 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.geometry
    This package contains classes to work with basic geometric entities such as 2D or 3D points, lines, planes, 2D or 3D triangles or polygons, circles, spheres, rotations, transformations etc.

    • Uses of ColinearPointsException in com.irurueta.geometry

      Methods in com.irurueta.geometry that throw ColinearPointsException 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void Circle.setParametersFromPoints​(Point2D point1, Point2D point2, Point2D point3)
      Sets parameters of a circle by using three points that must belong to its locus.
      void Ellipse.setParametersFromPoints​(Point2D point1, Point2D point2, Point2D point3, Point2D point4, Point2D point5)
      Sets parameters from 5 points.
      void Ellipse.setParametersFromPoints​(Point2D point1, Point2D point2, Point2D point3, Point2D point4, Point2D point5, double threshold)
      Sets parameters from 5 points.
      void Ellipse.setParametersFromPointsCenterAndRotation​(Point2D point1, Point2D point2, Point2D center, double theta)
      Sets parameters from 2 points, ellipse center and rotation.
      void Plane.setParametersFromThreePoints​(Point3D pointA, Point3D pointB, Point3D pointC)
      Computes and sets plane parameters using provided 3D points.
      Plane Triangle3D.toPlane()
      Returns the plane formed by the vertices of this triangle.
      void Triangle3D.toPlane​(Plane result)
      Computes the plane formed by the vertices of this triangle and stores the result into provided Plane instance.

      Constructor Description
      Circle​(Point2D point1, Point2D point2, Point2D point3)
      Constructor.
      Ellipse​(Point2D point1, Point2D point2, Point2D center, double theta)
      Constructor from 2 points, ellipse center and rotation.
      Ellipse​(Point2D point1, Point2D point2, Point2D point3, Point2D point4, Point2D point5)
      Constructor from 5 points.
      Ellipse​(Point2D point1, Point2D point2, Point2D point3, Point2D point4, Point2D point5, double threshold)
      Constructor from 5 points.
